name: LongMemory Context
description: Injects LongMemory profile and memory context before OpenClaw builds the model prompt.

baseUrl.description: LongMemory service base URL, for example https://example.ngrok-free.app

ingestToken.description: Bearer token for LongMemory private APIs

forceUserId.description: Optional user id override used during testing or single-user deployments

contextSentinel.description: Optional diagnostic instruction prepended to the injected context
